name: The Avengers
description: Earth's Mightiest Heroes — Marvel Avengers films and comics

questions.q: When Bruce Banner transforms into the Hulk, what color does he turn?

source.notes: Hulk was briefly grey in early Marvel Comics (1962) before becoming green.

questions.q: Which Avenger is the armored alter-ego of billionaire Tony Stark?

source.notes: Iron Man first appeared in Tales of Suspense #39 in 1963.

questions.q: What is the pre-serum civilian name of Captain America?

source.notes: First appeared in Captain America Comics #1 (1941).

questions.q: Thor famously wields which type of weapon?

source.notes: His hammer is named Mjolnir, forged from the metal uru.

questions.q: Who is the adopted trickster brother of Thor and recurring Avengers antagonist?

source.notes: God of Mischief; based on Norse mythology.

questions.q: Which comic-book publisher owns the rights to The Avengers?

source.notes: Published by Marvel Comics since the team's debut in 1963.

questions.q: What is the real name of the Avenger known as Black Widow?

source.notes: Russian-born former KGB spy turned S.H.I.E.L.D. agent.

questions.q: Who directed the 2012 film 'The Avengers'?

source.notes: Whedon also wrote and directed the 2015 sequel 'Age of Ultron'.

questions.q: Which Australian actor plays Thor in the Marvel Cinematic Universe?

source.notes: First played Thor in Kenneth Branagh's 'Thor' (2011).

questions.q: Which actress has played Black Widow throughout the MCU?

source.notes: Debuted in Iron Man 2 (2010); got her solo 'Black Widow' film in 2021.

questions.q: Who took over as Bruce Banner / The Hulk in the 2012 'Avengers' film?

source.notes: Ruffalo replaced Edward Norton from 'The Incredible Hulk' (2008).

questions.q: Who plays Tony Stark / Iron Man in the MCU?

source.notes: Debuted in Iron Man (2008); director Jon Favreau's casting was famously controversial at the time.

questions.q: Which actor plays the eye-patched S.H.I.E.L.D. director Nick Fury in the MCU?

source.notes: First appeared as Fury in a post-credits scene in Iron Man (2008).

questions.q: Which British actor plays Loki in the MCU?

source.notes: Debuted in Thor (2011).

questions.q: What is the name of the fictional spy agency that assembles the Avengers?

source.notes: Strategic Homeland Intervention, Enforcement and Logistics Division.

questions.q: Thor and Loki are drawn from which mythological tradition?

source.notes: Scandinavian/Norse myths — Thor is the god of thunder.

questions.q: Captain America spent decades frozen in ice after going down during which war?

source.notes: Steve Rogers crashed a Nazi plane into the Arctic; revived by S.H.I.E.L.D.

questions.q: In the 2012 film 'The Avengers', the climactic 'Battle of New York' is set in which city's borough of Manhattan?

source.notes: Stark Tower is the climactic location; portal opens above it.

questions.q: The first issue of 'The Avengers' comic was published in which year?

source.notes: Issue #1 released September 1963, created by Stan Lee and Jack Kirby.

questions.q: In the 2012 film 'The Avengers', which blue cube containing the Space Stone drives the plot?

source.notes: Contains the Space Stone; first seen in Captain America: The First Avenger.

questions.q: Which alien army invades New York City in the 2012 'Avengers' film?

source.notes: Led by Loki through a wormhole above Stark Tower.

questions.q: Who is the producer and longtime president of Marvel Studios, widely credited as the architect of the MCU?

source.notes: Has produced every MCU film since Iron Man (2008).
